page.title: Knowledge bases
page.description: Upload reference documents that Agents can search when a collection is explicitly bound.
page.createDescription: Private knowledge bases and their documents are visible only to your account.
page.listDescription: Shared and private knowledge bases remain read-only sources for Agent retrieval.
page.detailDescription: Manage source documents, indexing status, preview, and cleanup.
page.loadError: Could not load this knowledge base.

personal.title: Knowledge bases
personal.summary: Manage your private reference collections and browse active shared collections.
personal.ownedSummary: Your active and inactive collections and their private source documents.
personal.sharedSummary: Active global collections are shared, read-only reference sources for ordinary users.

global.title: Global knowledge bases
global.summary: Manage collections and source documents shared with every user.
global.listSummary: Documents uploaded to an active global collection are shared content, not per-user copies.

form.name: Name
form.qdrantModeReset: Qdrant supports vector retrieval only. Retrieval mode was changed to Vector.
form.retrieverImmutable: Retriever is selected when the knowledge base is created and cannot be changed later.
form.indexingHint: Changing the chunk size or overlap queues active documents for reindexing.
form.retrievalHint: Retrieval mode, Top K, threshold, and hybrid weights affect queries without rebuilding the index.
form.nameTaken: A knowledge base with this name already exists.
form.saveError: Could not save the knowledge base.

validation.chunkSize: Chunk size must be an integer from 200 to 4000.
validation.chunkOverlap: Chunk overlap must be an integer from 0 to 1000.
validation.chunkOverlapHalf: Chunk overlap cannot exceed half of the chunk size.
validation.topK: Top K must be an integer from 1 to 10.
validation.scoreThreshold: Score threshold must be a number from 0 to 1.
validation.weight: Weight must be a number from 0 to 1.
validation.weightSum: Vector and keyword weights cannot both be zero.

uploader.title: Upload documents
uploader.description: Supported formats: TXT, Markdown, PDF, and DOCX.
uploader.success: {{name}} was uploaded and queued for indexing.
uploader.error: The document could not be uploaded.

documents.title: Documents
documents.empty: No documents in this knowledge base.
documents.name: Document
documents.cleanupPending: Cleanup pending. Retry the explicit delete to finish cleanup.
documents.cleanupFailed: Cleanup failed. Retry the explicit delete to finish cleanup.
documents.resourceInUse: This document is still referenced by an Agent.
documents.previewError: The parsed document could not be loaded.
documents.downloadError: The original document could not be downloaded.
documents.reindexError: The document could not be queued for reindexing.
documents.deleteError: The document could not be deleted.
documents.embeddingAuthFailed: Embedding service authentication failed. Check the API key.
documents.embeddingRateLimited: Embedding service rate limit exceeded. Try again later.
documents.embeddingInvalidRequest: Embedding service rejected the request. Check the model configuration.
documents.embeddingProviderUnavailable: Embedding service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
documents.knowledgeUnavailable: Knowledge indexing service is temporarily unavailable. Reindex later.

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete the knowledge base "{{name}}"? Its documents must already be fully cleaned up.

errors.statusFailed: Could not change the knowledge base status.
errors.deleteFailed: Could not delete the knowledge base.
errors.resourceInUse: This knowledge base still has an active Agent reference, an active document, or unfinished document cleanup.
